summary: A top claim leads into a visible context panel, followed by a strategy triplet and a compact right-side or lower-right impact proof stack.
composition_pattern: top claim, context panel, strategy triplet, right-side metric stack
support_structure: context panel that explains the situation or challenge
three recommendation moves or named pillars
compact right-side or lower-right impact metric stack
when_to_use: The recommendation needs a meaningful context setup before the moves make sense.
Impact proof is important but should remain secondary to the central strategy board.
avoid_when: The page has almost no context narrative.
The page should be driven by one dominant KPI instead of a synthesis board.
